queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of how the absence of a checking account influences credit default probability and serves as a determinant of elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Investigating the contribution of negative checking account balances to borrower default likelihood as a significant credit risk driver.

queries.feature_definition: Credit history: critical account or other existing credits.
queries.question: Empirical evaluation of how maintaining critical accounts or holding other existing credit obligations mitigates default probability and reduces overall credit risk exposure.
